item.title: Moderna Bird Flu Vaccine
item.description:
• Summary: Moderna is advancing an mRNA vaccine for bird flu, with trials supported by CEPI and HHS. The study continues despite some U.S. limitations, aiming to address pandemic threats from avian influenza through rapid vaccine development platforms.
  • MoAs: Moderna's bird flu vaccine is an mRNA-based vaccine that encodes hemagglutinin antigens from the virus, stimulating an immune response to provide protection against infection.
  • Sources: BioPharma Dive, STAT News

item.title: Moderna EU Approval (Flu-COVID Combo)
item.description:
• Summary: Moderna receives European Union approval for its combination mRNA vaccine targeting both seasonal influenza and COVID-19, a significant regulatory achievement amid ongoing challenges in the U.S. market.
  • MoAs: mRNA-based vaccine encoding antigens for influenza viruses and SARS-CoV-2, eliciting immune responses to prevent infection from both pathogens.
  • Sources: Biospace
